items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original packaging
💕Miss Dior handbag「 」
This Miss Dior flap bag made its debut at the Dior Fall-Winter 2024 Ready-to-Wear show, reinterpreting the modern elegance of a classic Dior style. Crafted with care using black calfskin and studs, it features a contrasting fashion metal plate adorned with the classic Miss Dior Graffiti pattern, showcasing a timeless aesthetic. The main compartment under the flap features a zip pocket for organizing daily essentials. With an adjustable strap, it can be worn on the shoulder to create a high-fashion look.
Main material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Enamel Miss Dior Graffiti logo plate
Magnetic flap closure
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Internal compartment
Internal zip pocket and slip pocket
Model: 2610
Dimensions: 22 x 11 x 6 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, and lipstick

Dior Groove♣️16 Mini Bag 'White Embossed Quilted'
This Dior Groove 16 Mini Bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from white calfskin with embossing, it features a large quilted effect houndstooth pattern to elevate the style. The spacious compartment can hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily styling.
Zipper closure
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 1365
Dimensions: 16 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
Top-tier original with full packaging
Dior Groove♣️ 20 Bag 'Small White Embossed Quilted'
This Dior Groove 20 Bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from white calfskin with embossing, it features a large quilted effect houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key pouch is embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, unique and distinctive. The zipper lock can be opened with the attached key. The spacious compartment features an insert pocket and a zip pocket to hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily styling.
Zipper closure, with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key pouch embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with vintage gold-finish metal stars, with key
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal insert pocket
Model: 1365
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 phone, 1 wallet, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick

This Miss Dior Flap Bag made its debut at the Dior Fall/Winter 2024 Haute Couture show, reinterpreting the modern elegance of the Dior classic.
